title: Impactful
description: Adds Customizable Impact Frames to Mace Kills
body:
# Impactful
**Maces Made Fancy**                                                 

**Impactful** is a mod that adds impact frames to mace kills.
These impact frames are highly customizable, and easy to swap or change as desired.                           
(Note, it can be changed to any kill in general)

-----------

**How to use**                                       
Press U in‑game to open the mod’s config menu. From there you can toggle the effect and adjust basic settings.

**How to change impact frames**                                     
In the Modrinth app, open your instance, click the three dots, then choose “Open folder”.
Find the maceimpact folder. Inside you’ll see the preset frames the mod provides and a text file explaining how to add and format your own frames.                                       

-----------
## **Photosensitivity warning!!!**    

This mod contains flashing lights and strong visual effects. If you have epilepsy or photosensitive conditions, use caution or avoid this mod.     

-----------
### News                                       
This isn't news just more of me saying im going to revamp this desc since its a mess.


### Contributors
[
**SkI_** <-- Mapping and mod planning                                         
**dashinex** <-- Helped make the 1.21.11 version]                                   
Need help or wanna be in our community? Join our Discord! https://discord.com/invite/cxDuUZFCXc

Supported versions: 1.21.11                                
I've decided from this point to only support 1.21.11 as supporting lower versions would be an unproductive use of my time, also because 1.21.11 is the most used pvp version. Think of it as how almost all steam games support Windows but not all of them support Mac.
